name: PC Deals Weekly Update: May 18, 2003
description: As we stated last week in this column, prices on PCs with Intel Pentium 4 Hyper-Threading technology have been falling into quite affordable price points. In response to these price decreases PC Deals has decided to eliminate the separate Hyper-Threading (HT) category at the bottom of our weekly spreadsheet. From now on we will place HT machines along side "regular" P4 machines and compare all PCs side-by-side by price.
